entity.label: Berechiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Son of Shimea, and father of Asaph the musician (1 Chr. 6:39; 15:17).

nodes.label: Berechiah
nodes.description: Son of Shimea, and father of Asaph the musician (1 Chr. 6:39; 15:17).

nodes.label: Shimea
nodes.description: Another Levite of the family of Gershon (1 Chr. 6:39).

nodes.label: Asaph (Levite)
nodes.description: A Levite; one of the leaders of David’s choir (1 Chr. 6:39). Psalms 50 and 73-83 inclusive are attributed to him. He is mentioned along with David as skilled in music, and a “seer” (2 Chr. 29:30). The “sons of Asaph,” mentioned in 1 Chr. 25:1, 2 Chr. 20:14, and Ezra 2:41, were his descendants, or more probably a class of poets or singers who recognized him as their master.

verses.text: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berachiah, the son of Shimea,
So the Levites appointed Heman the son of Joel; and of his brethren, Asaph the son of Berechiah; and of the sons of Merari their brethren, Ethan the son of Kushaiah;
And Berechiah and Elkanah were doorkeepers for the ark.
